inputs.label: Turkey Weight
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of the turkey before cooking, without giblets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net weight of the turkey before cooking, without giblets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pişirmeden önce hindinin sakatatsız net ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Oven Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Set temperature of the oven. Standard roasting temperature is 175°C (350°F).

businessContext_i18n.en: Set temperature of the oven. Standard roasting temperature is 175°C (350°F).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fırının ayarlanan sıcaklığı. Standart kızartma sıcaklığı 175°C'dir (350°F).

inputs.label: Stuffed
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether the turkey cavity is filled with stuffing. Stuffed turkeys require longer cooking to ensure safe internal temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether the turkey cavity is filled with stuffing. Stuffed turkeys require longer cooking to ensure safe internal temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hindi boşluğunun iç harçla doldurulup doldurulmadığını belirtir. Doldurulmuş hindiler, güvenli iç sıcaklığa ulaşmak için daha uzun pişirme süresi gerektirir.

inputs.label: Starting Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Initial temperature of the turkey. Typically refrigerated at 4°C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial temperature of the turkey. Typically refrigerated at 4°C.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
